package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_byte_string_roundtrip_for_contains: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: String handling. Flag string/[]byte roundtrips around Contains/Index checks that have native package variants.
type CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContains(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerStringHandlingByteStringRoundtripForContainsDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_string_handling"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "string": 3, "handling": 4, "byte": 5, "roundtrip": 6}
    perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    for _, item := range items {
        s := string(item.Payload)
        if strings.Contains(s, item.ID) {
            perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive[item.ID] = len(item.Payload)
        }
    }
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    string_positive_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_2
    handling_positive_3 := perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive["handling"] + len(input)
    _ = handling_positive_3
    byte_positive_4 := perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive["byte"] + len(input)
    _ = byte_positive_4
    roundtrip_positive_5 := perf_layer_string_handling_byte_positive["roundtrip"] + len(input)
    _ = roundtrip_positive_5
    return nil
}
